stopConditions: Do not expand broad examples, research papers, conferences, or generic AI literacy pages into allowed tool records.
For official tool directories, split explicitly named tools into one record per tool.

methodsAttempted.query: QS 101-110 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search and targeted official-page fetches were used across QS101-110. Tool-level evidence was found for Utrecht, RWTH Aachen, DTU, Queen Mary, UW-Madison, and St Andrews.

artifacts.summary: QS101-110 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for six universities. Lomonosov Moscow State University, Universidade de Sao Paulo, Tohoku University, and Qatar University were not expanded because no official tool-level availability source was found in this pass.

artifacts.title: QS101-110 AI Tools Extraction
artifacts.summary: Validated tool-level AI tools extraction for QS101-110, with official source-backed records for Utrecht, RWTH Aachen, DTU, Queen Mary, UW-Madison, and St Andrews.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Records are tracker-derived summaries from public official sources and do not replace official university pages.
Schools without explicit tool-level official evidence were not expanded into named tool conclusions.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Microsoft Copilot is listed for Utrecht University in an official university AI tools source. Derived availability: restricted or blocked. Derived endorsement type: institutionally licensed or procured.
artifacts.normalizedValue: {"tool":"microsoft_copilot","rawToolName":"Microsoft Copilot","description":"Utrecht says its Microsoft offering includes Copilot, but explicitly discourages student use while safe AI tooling is still being arranged.","howToObtain":"Included in the UU Microsoft offering; students are directed to follow UU AI conditions of use and note that UU discourages Copilot use.","costToUser":"Not specified.","availability":"restricted_or_blocked","endorsementType":"institutionally_licensed_or_procured"}
